Off Calendar Dec-24-2012 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul F. Utrecht, Esq., 415.925.1488, for plaintiffs Telegraph Hill Properties Inc. and North Beach Partners LLCs.
George M. Lee, Esq., 415.979.0500, for defendants Erin Thomon and Seiler Epstein Ziegler & Applegate, LLP.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling: PLAINTIFFs TELEGRAPH HILL PROPERTIES, INC. and NORTH BEACH PARTNERS LLC's MOTION FOR LEAVE TO To Take Discovery To Respond To Anti-Slapp Motion is denied. Plaintiff fails to establish good cause for the depositions. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Marla Miller, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: LaVena Ward #7077.

Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Dec-13-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Paul F. Utrecht, Esq., 415.925.1488, for plaintiffs Telegraph Hill Properties, Inc. and North Beach Partners LLC.
Douglas A. Applegate, Esq., 415.979.0500, for defendants Erin Thomsen and Seiler Epstein Ziegler & Applegate, LLP.

RULING: Matter argued. At conclusion of argument, the Court grants in part/denies in part Plaintiffs Telegraph Hill Properties, Inc. and North Beach Partners LLC's Motion for Preliminary Injunction.
